ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EGAN, CARLOS A $7,429.12 PRINCIPAL, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,723.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60281045)
